title: Experiment
description: An evaluation run that executes an LLM application against a Dataset and collects feedback scores for each DatasetItem. Experiments support multiple types and evaluation methods.

dataset_name.description: Name of the Dataset this experiment runs against.

dataset_id.description: UUID of the Dataset this experiment runs against.

project_id.description: Project ID. Takes precedence over project_name when both are provided.

project_name.description: Project name. Creates project if it does not exist. Ignored when project_id is provided.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the experiment.

evaluation_method.description: Method used to drive the evaluation (standard dataset or evaluation suite).

optimization_id.description: UUID of the Optimization workflow this experiment belongs to, if any.

feedback_scores.description: Aggregated average feedback scores across all experiment items.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the experiment was created.

last_updated_at.description: Timestamp when the experiment was last updated.

created_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who created the experiment.

last_updated_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who last updated the experiment.

trace_count.description: Number of traces (experiment items) in this experiment.

duration.description: Duration of the experiment run in milliseconds.

total_estimated_cost.description: Estimated total cost of LLM API calls made during this experiment.
